per_turn_leaks.student_message: Any sweating or clamminess when the symptoms hit?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: Yes, actually... I've been feeling quite hot and sweaty when my symptoms hit, especially at night. It's really uncomfortable and makes me feel even more exhausted in the mornings.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: So no perspiration at all during the episodes?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: I tend to get really hot and sweat a lot when my symptoms are at their worst.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Does the discomfort stay in one spot, or does it move around?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: I do get some chest pain, but it's on the right side and feels sharp.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Any stomach issues during the episodes? Nausea, queasiness, upset stomach?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: I've actually been experiencing some decreased appetite over the past few days, which is unusual for me. I just haven't felt like eating much lately.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Have you noticed any changes in your appetite or weight?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: I haven't really felt like eating much lately, which is unusual for me. And I have been feeling a bit more tired than usual, even when I'm not exerting myself.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: What does a typical day of eating look like for you?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: My appetite has really been off lately. I try to stick to simple meals like oatmeal or toast for breakfast, and sometimes I'll have a salad or soup for lunch if I can muster up the energy.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Any medical problems in your family? Parents, siblings?
Specifically, has anyone in your family had serious diseases?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: My mom has asthma that she manages well with medication, and my grandmother on her side passed away from lung cancer when I was younger.
